2605.01478.title: LIE: LiDAR-only HD Map Construction with Intensity Enhancement via Online Knowledge Distillation
2605.01478.paper_summary: Online High-Definition (HD) map construction is a key component of autonomous driving. Recent methods rely on multi-view camera images for cost-effective HD map segmentation, but cameras lack depth information for accurate scene geometry. In contrast, LiDAR provides precise 3D measurements but lacks dense semantic cues. In this work, we propose LIE, LiDAR-only semantic map construction method that employ Knowledge Distillation (KD) to handle the lack of dense semantic and texture cues. Specifically, the teacher branch fuses student LiDAR features and the corresponding 2D intensity map tile to provide dense supervision for segmenting map elements using online distillation scheme. Experimental results show that our method outperforms all single-modality approaches, achieving 8.2% higher mIoU than the state-of-the-art camera-based model on nuScenes. LIE is robust over long ranges and under challenging weather and lighting, and efficiently adapts to Argoverse2 with only 10% fine-tuning, surpassing camera-based models trained on the full dataset. Source code will be available \href{https://iv.ee.hm.edu/lie/}{here}.
2605.01478.paper_summary_zh: 線上高解析度 (HD) 地圖建構是自動駕駛的關鍵組成部分。最近的方法依賴於多視角相機影像進行具成本效益的 HD 地圖分割，但相機缺乏準確場景幾何的深度資訊。相比之下，LiDAR 提供精確的 3D 測量，但缺乏密集的語意線索。在這項工作中，我們提出了 LIE，一種僅使用 LiDAR 的語意地圖建構方法，該方法利用知識蒸餾 (KD) 來處理缺乏密集語意和紋理線索的問題。具體而言，教師分支融合了學生 LiDAR 特徵和相應的 2D 強度圖塊，以提供密集的監督，使用在線蒸餾方案來分割地圖元素。實驗結果顯示，我們的方法在所有單一模態方法中表現最佳，在 nuScenes 上比最先進的基於相機的模型高出 8.2% 的 mIoU。LIE 在長距離和挑戰性的天氣及光照下表現穩健，並且在僅進行 10% 微調的情況下有效適應 Argoverse2，超越了在完整數據集上訓練的基於相機的模型。源代碼將在 \href{https://iv.ee.hm.edu/lie/}{這裡} 提供。
2605.01478.author: Kanak Mazumder et.al.
